commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] No narrow ClawSweeper repair is needed; the remaining action is maintainer review of compatibility-sensitive session/auth fallback semantics and proof-check formatting.; Cleared: The diff changes CLI/session runtime behavior and tests, with no workflow, dependency, lockfile, install script, secret-handling, or third-party code execution change found. (sha=542258721cdccdd16baa76778975a7a477da135d)
commands.review_summary:
The PR moves stale resumed CLI-session retry into the CLI runner lifecycle, adds recoverable empty timeout/unknown-exit retry classification, clears stale stored bindings before retry, and expands CLI reliability coverage.

PR surface: Source +67, Tests +516. Total +583 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection rather than a live current-main run. Current main retries only session_expired and the linked issue plus existing test shape identify timeout/unknown resumed-session failures as the remaining gap.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No narrow ClawSweeper repair is needed; the remaining action is maintainer review of compatibility-sensitive session/auth fallback semantics and proof-check formatting.

target.title: Retry stale CLI sessions inside runner lifecycle
target.body:
## Summary
- Moves stale resumed CLI session recovery into the CLI runner lifecycle so hooks see only the final outcome.
- Retries fresh only for recoverable resumed-session failures with reseed context: `session_expired`, empty no-output timeout, and empty unclassified CLI exit.
- Clears stored stale CLI bindings before command-path fresh retry when a mutable session store is available, while preserving storeless/direct runner behavior.
- Keeps auth, billing, rate limit, hard overall timeout, cancellations, diagnostic-output failures, and acted/stalled turns as no-retry paths.

Refs #77089

## Proof
- Real local command-path behavior proof from `C:\oc-work\oc-77089` on branch `issue-77089`:
  - Command: `powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\.artifacts\issue-77089-proof-tools\run-real-behavior-proof.ps1`
  - Passed with exit code 0 using an isolated `OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH`/`OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR` and a local CLI backend executable through the real `openclaw agent --local --json` command path. No live channel auth was used.
  - Terminal proof excerpt from `.artifacts\issue-77089-real-proof\terminal-retry.log`:
    ```text
    [agent/cli-backend] cli exec: provider=proof-cli model=model promptChars=55 trigger=user useResume=true session=present resumeSession=a8fc01f726ed reuse=reusable historyPrompt=present
    [agent/cli-backend] cli argv: node C:\oc-work\oc-77089\.artifacts\issue-77089-proof-tools\proof-cli.mjs --mode resume --resume stale-session-77089
    [agents/agent-command] CLI session failed, clearing before fresh retry: provider=proof-cli sessionKey=agent:main:issue-77089-real-proof reason=unknown
    [agent/cli-backend] cli session recovery retry: provider=proof-cli reason=unknown sessionKey=agent:main:issue-77089-real-proof
    [agent/cli-backend] cli exec: provider=proof-cli model=model promptChars=440 trigger=user useResume=false session=none resumeSession=none reuse=reusable historyPrompt=present
    [agent/cli-backend] cli argv: node C:\oc-work\oc-77089\.artifacts\issue-77089-proof-tools\proof-cli.mjs --mode fresh --session-id b8204865-3410-41e6-9a3b-93060eb0acff
    REAL_BEHAVIOR_PROOF_OK fresh session=b8204865-3410-41e6-9a3b-93060eb0acff
    ```
  - Backend sidecar proof from `.artifacts\issue-77089-real-proof\backend-events.jsonl`:
    ```text
    invoke mode=resume argv=[...,"--resume","stale-session-77089"]
    stale_resume_empty_unknown_exit resumeSessionId=stale-session-77089 stdoutBytes=0 stderrBytes=0 exitCode=77
    invoke mode=fresh argv=[...,"--session-id","b8204865-3410-41e6-9a3b-93060eb0acff"] stdinChars=440 stdinHasReseedPrompt=true
    fresh_success sessionId=b8204865-3410-41e6-9a3b-93060eb0acff
    final_binding=b8204865-3410-41e6-9a3b-93060eb0acff
    ```
  - The seeded store before retry contained `cliSessionBindings.proof-cli.sessionId = stale-session-77089` with `forceReuse=true`; after the run the persisted binding was replaced by the fresh session id above.
- Native Windows focused Vitest from `C:\oc-work\oc-77089`:
  - `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/command/attempt-execution.cli.test.ts src/agents/cli-runner.reliability.test.ts`
  - Passed: 2 files, 71 tests, 1 Vitest shard in 24.44s.
- Whitespace proof:
  - `git diff --check`
  - Passed with no output.
- Local Crabbox/Docker proof:
  - Provider/id: `local-container`, `cbx_ab78f1b74b26` (`coral-lobster`).
  - Image: `openclaw-77089-crabbox-node-rsync:latest`, built locally from `node:24-bookworm` with `rsync`/git/build tools.
  - Command shape: `CI=1 corepack pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`, then `env CI=1 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_TIMEOUT_MS=900000 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/command/attempt-execution.cli.test.ts src/agents/cli-runner.reliability.test.ts`, then `git diff --check`.
  - Result: passed. Timing JSON reported `syncSkipped=true`, `exitCode=0`, `install=30.351s`, `test=82.284s`, `diff-check=127ms`; Vitest reported 2 files, 71 tests passed.
- Focused behavior coverage:
  - Fresh retry succeeds after recoverable stale resumed-session `session_expired`, empty no-output timeout, and empty unknown CLI exit.
  - Stored stale binding is cleared before retry when the command path owns a mutable session store.
  - Successful retry emits one final successful `agent_end`, avoiding the failed-then-success hook ordering risk.
  - No retry for auth, billing, rate limit, hard overall timeout, missing reseed prompt, no reusable session, diagnostic unknown output, no-output after CLI activity, exhausted timeout budget, and supervisor cancellation.
- Local autoreview:
  - `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
  - Clean: no accepted/actionable findings reported.

## Notes
- Draft PR only.
- No live channel auth or live Telegram/Discord paths used.
- Normal Crabbox `local-container` sync on this Windows host is blocked before command execution by its rsync/SSH bridge passing an identity path like `/tmp/crabbox-wsl-<id>` to MSYS rsync while the private key is not present at the MSYS-visible `/tmp` path. The native Windows proof and real command-path proof above are direct host proof, and the local-container proof above ran the command inside the lease after copying the checkout separately.
target.author: brokemac79

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
